adjustments.summary: Confirm the exact shurjoPay callback/IPN verification method, payload contract, stable event identifier, and authoritative payment-verification flow before any Phase 5 code begins.
Keep the documented env/config-key contract, but do not activate live credentials until the project records an explicit go-live confirmation.
Confirm whether initial Phase 5 code scope is limited to invoice-backed guardian payments or whether a dedicated donor payable model will be approved first.
Confirm the dedicated receipt-number rule and any manual-bank evidence storage/retention requirements before payment finalization code is implemented.

notes: The provider decision is now recorded: shurjopay is the current online gateway, manual_bank is the current fallback, and bkash/nagad are future-only providers.
The new payment spec package lives at `docs/codex-autopilot/docs/PHASE_5_PAYMENT_PROVIDER_SPEC.md`.
Phase 5 code remains blocked because provider-selection is no longer the issue; the remaining blockers are callback/IPN security details, receipt numbering, and donor payable scope.
